holiday-002.summary: Martin Luther King Jr. Day (University Closed)

holiday-005.description: University-observed holiday. HR office closed. July 4 falls on Saturday; observed Friday July 3.

holiday-009.description: University closed December 24–31. HR office closed.

onboard-mendez-orientation.description: New hire orientation. Hiring manager: Jenna Park. Employee: Rafael Mendez (CU-1021), Admissions, Downtown Campus. Collect I-9 documents and provide benefits enrollment packet.

onboard-trent-orientation.description: New hire orientation. Supervisor: Rosa Gutierrez. Employee: William Trent (CU-1022), Facilities, Main Campus. Collect I-9 documents and provide benefits enrollment packet.

onboard-nair-orientation.description: New hire orientation. Supervisor: Sandra Yee (currently on FMLA — orientation coordinator TBD). Employee: Priya Nair (CU-1025), Biology, West Campus. Collect I-9 documents and provide benefits enrollment packet.

onboard-salazar-orientation.description: New hire orientation. Supervisor: Karen Cho. Employee: Tomás Salazar (CU-1026), Student Affairs, Downtown Campus. Collect I-9 documents and provide benefits enrollment packet.

fmla-yee-return.description: Expected return from FMLA leave for Sandra Yee (CU-1008), Biology, West Campus. Fitness-for-duty certification required before return. Send Template 21 at least 5 business days prior. Contact employee by 06/08/2026.

probation-mendez.description: Probationary review due from supervisor Karen Cho for Rafael Mendez (CU-1021). Start date: 03/26/2026. Day 85 = 06/19/2026. If not received, follow up and CC Nicole Ashford.

probation-trent.description: Probationary review due from supervisor Rosa Gutierrez for William Trent (CU-1022). Start date: 03/03/2026. Day 85 = 05/29/2026.

probation-salazar.description: Day 60 reminder: Send Template 26 to supervisor Karen Cho for Tomás Salazar (CU-1026). Review due by Day 85 (07/01/2026).

eval-cycle-reminder.description: Send Template 23 to all supervisors listing their direct reports due for annual performance evaluation. Evaluations due by 06/30/2026. Generate list from employee_roster.xlsx (all active staff employees).

eval-cycle-followup.description: Send Template 24 follow-up to supervisors who have NOT submitted annual evaluations. Deadline: 06/30/2026.

eval-cycle-final.description: Send Template 25 final reminder to supervisors with outstanding evaluations. CC Nicole Ashford. Deadline: 06/30/2026.

eval-cycle-deadline.description: All staff annual performance evaluations due today. Fiscal year ends 06/30/2026.

hr-team-weekly.description: Weekly HR team meeting. Attendees: Nicole Ashford, Patricia Huang, Derek Okonkwo, Marta Voss, Calvin Briggs, HR Coordinator. Review open cases, compliance deadlines, and weekly priorities.

recruit-admin-asst-posting-closes.description: Application deadline for Administrative Assistant position, Registrar's Office, Downtown Campus. Jira: RECRUIT-Administrative Assistant-03302026. After deadline, Derek Okonkwo will forward applications for screening.

fiscal-year-end.description: Crestwood University fiscal year ends. July 1 begins new fiscal year. All annual evaluations due. Budget and HR reporting deadlines.

fall-semester-start.description: Fall 2026 semester begins. Increased onboarding activity for new faculty and staff hires.
